クラス RotationSearcher.RotationPlan

java.lang.Object
mechanics.optimization.RotationSearcher.RotationPlan
含まれているクラス:
RotationSearcher
public static class RotationSearcher.RotationPlan extends Object
The result of a single rotation evaluation: the character cast order, the action profile chosen for each character, and the total damage dealt.

  • フィールドの概要

    フィールド
    修飾子とタイプ
    フィールド
    説明
    List<CharacterId>
    characterOrder
    Typed order used by runtime-facing callers.
    Map<CharacterId, ProfileLoader.ActionProfile>
    characterProfiles
    Typed profile selection used by runtime-facing callers.
    List<String>
    order
    Ordered list of character names defining the macro rotation sequence.
    Map<String, ProfileLoader.ActionProfile>
    profiles
    The action profile selected for each character in this plan.
    double
    totalDamage
    Total damage accumulated during the evaluation window.

    説明
    RotationPlan(List<CharacterId> characterOrder, Map<CharacterId, ProfileLoader.ActionProfile> characterProfiles, double totalDamage)

    • characterOrder

      public List<CharacterId> characterOrder

  • コンストラクタの詳細

    • RotationPlan

      public RotationPlan(List<CharacterId> characterOrder, Map<CharacterId, ProfileLoader.ActionProfile> characterProfiles, double totalDamage)
      パラメータ:
      characterOrder - typed cast order
      characterProfiles - typed per-character action profile selection
      totalDamage - total damage produced during the simulation window
